overview: Based on the published agenda, the Kronenwetter Police and Fire Commission was scheduled to meet on June 22, 2026, to review and approve minutes from previous meetings and discuss possible revisions to the Commission's complaint form. The meeting represented routine governance and procedural matters for the village's public safety oversight body.

agenda.item: Approval of minutes from 04/27/2026 and 06/01/2026 meetings
Discussion and possible action regarding revision to Commission's complaint form

discussions.body: The Commission was scheduled to approve meeting minutes from two previous sessions held on April 27, 2026, and June 1, 2026. This routine item was set for action at the meeting.
The Commission was scheduled to discuss and consider possible revisions to the complaint form used by the Commission. The agenda indicated this item was set for both discussion and possible action.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda, limited to 15 minutes total with a three-minute period per person, subject to extension at the presiding officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to approve minutes from 04/27/2026 and 06/01/2026 meetings
Expected to consider revisions to the Commission's complaint form
title: Police and Fire Commission Meeting - 2026-06-22
